title: PaperBinModPack
description: It's a modpack for PaperBin's players
body:
# What is it?
It's the modpack for PaperBin's players. You can watch the [video](https://youtu.be/M7q1qV4GMhU?si=Dm9sDysvK5kvuFk3) about this modpack and how to use it.
# About
This is the client-side modpack for PaperBin.

This modpack has necessary mods for playing on PaperBin and mods which are needed for a custom resourcepack of the server.

This modpack optimizes and makes Minecraft more beautiful by using a lot of different mods for that.

Also, modpack has many useful in the game mods which you didn't see.

A big reason to install this modpack is that it is completely vanilla. It means that it doesn't add new items, mobs, dungeons etc.

Under you can see the full list of mods with links. For convenience, they are divided into different sections.

SOON means that mod didn't update to the last version of MP(ModPack)
# Mods
**Mods for PaperBin**
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Voice Messages](https://modrinth.com/mod/voicemessages)
- [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft)
- [Online Emotes](https://modrinth.com/mod/online-emotes)
- [Status](https://modrinth.com/mod/status)
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)
- [Carpet Shadow Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-shadow-legacy)

**Mods for server resourcepack**
